articles.title: Ex-judges say feds ‘micromanaging’ immigration courts
articles.description:
“The changes that are happening to immigration law are so quick and so beyond anything that we’ve ever seen before.”

The post Ex-judges say feds ‘micromanaging’ immigration courts appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Ex-judges criticize federal control over Boston's immigration courts as unprecedented.
Changes in immigration law are occurring rapidly, affecting local legal processes.
Boston residents may face delays and confusion in immigration proceedings due to federal micromanagement.
